description: This file is a JavaScript module that acts as an adapter for persona repositories, providing an abstraction over different storage implementations (in-memory, MySQL, Postgres). It exports functions for creating, retrieving, updating personas and their versions, as well as managing drafts and final blobs, with logic to select the appropriate repository based on configuration.

methods.name: isDbConfiguredPublic
methods.description: Checks if the database configuration is set up properly.

methods.name: createPersona
methods.description: Creates a new persona using the configured persistence layer.

methods.name: getPersonaById
methods.description: Retrieves a persona by its ID.

methods.name: createPersonaVersion
methods.description: Creates a new version of a persona.

methods.name: listPersonaVersions
methods.description: Lists all versions of a persona.

methods.name: getLatestPersonaVersion
methods.description: Retrieves the latest version of a persona.

methods.name: saveDraft
methods.description: Saves a draft JSON blob for a persona.

methods.name: getDraft
methods.description: Retrieves a draft JSON blob for a persona.

methods.name: saveFinal
methods.description: Saves a final JSON blob for a persona.

methods.name: getFinal
methods.description: Retrieves the final JSON blob for a persona.
